title: rubia rotundifolia
intro: Rubia rotundifolia, also known as Indian madder or round-leaved madder, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been used to treat conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, and it is also valued for its potential antioxidant and anti-aging effects. Rubia rotundifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used to create natural dyes due to its high content of anthraquinone compounds.
